Harnessing AI is a game won by creativity

You don’t just “use” the model 

This narrative that “the next model will be so good the quality of your prompt doesn’t matter” is completely incorrect

That is not the direction LLMs are improving

Remember when AI tools were first released and hardly anyone else was using them? 

Back when there was real alpha in being able to vibe code a landing page, or a demo? 

Now everyone has access to the same thing, and the bar is so much higher.

Now apply this to all forms of

I don’t think we appreciate how much AI video has blown out the supply chain of memes
